Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Continued To Jan-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, via Zoom, for Yau-Choi Luk Geary.

Mr. Zohar confirms a scrivener's error in the petition and confirms that the Decedent's date of death as Jul-24-2012. The court and counsel discuss the notice issue and of counsel's efforts to contact family members in Hong Kong. Counsel offers testimony in advocacy of his efforts. The court waives notice in open court. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to this petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated May-25-1998 was admitted to probate in Hong Kong on Nov-20-2012. Yau-Choi Luk Geary is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,300,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-17-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
